content: We can frame Self-Refine as the iterative feedback 'workhorse' and Reflexion as the long-term memory 'historian' to build a layered self-improving LLM agent, where Self-Refine handles incremental refinement of individual outputs and Reflexion stores cumulative self-reflection lessons to speed up future refinement across different tasks. This structure eliminates the need for external supervision at both the single-output and cross-task levels.
